proven.claim: Transition: HookInstaller.install() sets `path` only when it can be
proven.smt2:
; LINE: 106  ; PRINCIPLE: P5 – Semantic Correctness (hook path)
(declare-const has_path Int)              ; 1 = result.path present
(declare-const len_path Int)              ; length of the path string
; Transition: HookInstaller.install() sets `path` only when it can be
; written; in that case the string is a valid filesystem path (non‑empty).
(assert (= has_path 1))
(assert (> len_path 0))
; Negated property: path present but empty
(assert (and (= has_path 1) (<= len_path 0)))
(check-sat)                               ; unsat → path non‑empty
